# SoftJunk Lead Kit

SoftJunk Lead Kit is a $5 lead follow-up offer for small businesses that get leads from forms, DMs, email, ads, referrals, or calls.

Main page:
https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/

Root buyer hub:
https://trungcodeer.github.io/

Payment intent JSON:
https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/paypal-payment-intent.json

Well-known payment intent:
https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/.well-known/paypal-payment.json

Root payment intent JSON:
https://trungcodeer.github.io/paypal.json

https://gist.github.com/trungcodeer/167d3dc5f8696bf9edb04d3db6c53a02

Payment:
https://paypal.me/softjunk/5USD

PayPal QR page:
https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/pay-qr.html

Printable QR flyer:
https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/printable-paypal-flyer.html

https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/paypal-qr.svg

Social card:
https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/social-card-qr.png

GitHub order issue forms:
https://github.com/trungcodeer/softjunk-lead-kit/issues/new/choose

Pinned public order board:
https://github.com/trungcodeer/softjunk-lead-kit/issues/1

Offers:
- Free AI follow-up prompt for $0: copy into ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, or a VA workflow to recover one quiet lead and route to the 5 USD custom sequence when useful.
- Public buyer examples thread for $0: missed call, quiet quote, and price-objection examples with the exact 5 USD PayPal path.
- Free AI agent buyer packet for $0: compact decision packet with the audit route, exact PayPal URL, copyable prompt, payment note, and seller-side verification rule.
- Free lead recovery audit for $0: estimates missed lead value, rewrites a weak follow-up, and creates a PayPal note.
- Free lead loss calculator for $0: estimates missed monthly value from weak follow-up and creates a PayPal note.
- Free lead follow-up rewriter for $0: rewrites one weak follow-up message and creates a PayPal note.
- Free preview for $0: browser-generated Day 0, 1, and 3 sample for one business.
- Digital kit for $5: 7-day follow-up guide, message templates, lead tracker CSV, and AI prompts.
- Custom sequence for $5: Day 0, 1, 3, 5, and 7 messages written for one business, plus no-show and price-objection replies.

Delivery:
The product ZIP is not public. Buyers pay through PayPal and receive fulfillment manually using the email shown in the PayPal transaction.
After-payment handoff: https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/after-pay.html
Payment verification script: scripts/verify-paypal-5usd.ps1 in the GitHub repository.
Manual CSV verification: run scripts/verify-paypal-5usd.ps1 -CsvPath "C:\path\to\paypal-activity.csv" -NoteContains "Lead Follow-Up Kit" against a seller-side PayPal activity export.
GitHub Actions workflow template: PAYPAL_VERIFICATION_WORKFLOW.yml.example. The enabled workflow should succeed only when the verifier prints PAYPAL_PAYMENT_VERIFIED=true.

PayPal notes:
- Digital kit: Lead Follow-Up Kit
- Custom sequence: fill the free generator, click Copy PayPal note, and paste that note into PayPal before paying.
- Agent order: open the AI agent order path, generate the PayPal note, and paste it into PayPal before paying.
- Buyer index: use https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/buyer-index.json to choose the shortest path for one quiet lead, weak follow-up rewrite, answer lookup, custom sequence, or direct checkout.

Best-fit buyers:
- Dental offices with new patient inquiries, treatment questions, missed calls, or consultation requests
- Appointment setters, virtual assistants, and small agencies
- Med spas and appointment-based wellness businesses
- Tutoring and academic coaching services
- Local service businesses
- Businesses with missed calls, voicemails, and leads that went quiet after first contact
- Businesses with sent estimates, quotes, proposals, or price ranges that need decision follow-up
- HVAC, roofing, plumbing, and real estate operators with high-value inquiry follow-up
- Small agencies, freelancers, and virtual assistants helping clients with lead follow-up
